title: Bata India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bata India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!
